content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 9, 2), (5, 8, 4), (6, 7, 5), (0, 4, 10), (0, 2, 14), (5, 7, 14), (0, 1, 18), (1, 2, 18), (2, 3, 20), (7, 8, 28), (1, 7, 29), (5, 6, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 18.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (6, 9, 2) has node 6 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 8, 4) has node 5 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 7, 5) has node 6 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 4, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 2, 14) has node 0 and time 14. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (5, 7, 14) has node 5 and time 14. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 2, 18) has node 1 and time 18. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 3, 20) has node 2 and time 20. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (7, 8, 28) has node 7 and time 28. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 7, 29) has node 1 and time 29. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 6, 29) has node 5 and time 29. -> Add node 6.

Now we have the following nodes matched at time 18: 1, 2, and 7.

Answer: [1, 2, 7]
